positive: A central, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon and constellation in cosmic watercolor style. The scene features stylized celestial bodies: glowing, interconnected points forming recognizable constellations (e.g., the Big Dipper outline, Orion's belt) integrated with swirling, nebula-like gas clouds. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, shimmering gold, and ethereal turquoise. The overall composition must be highly stylized, clean silhouette-friendly, and designed to look excellent on solid fabric backgrounds. High contrast required, with luminous glowing accents against a deep, matte background. Vector illustration quality, graphic design poster aesthetic, flat vector art style, perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed, 4K.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, graffiti, realistic photo, messy, grain, saturation bomb, complex background clutter
